name: plex
title: Plex Media Server
description: Plex Media Server with LinuxServer.io image — organize and stream your personal media collection with hardware transcoding support

variables.name: PLEX_CLAIM
variables.label: Plex Claim Token
variables.description: Claim token from https://plex.tv/claim (valid for 4 minutes, optional for existing setups)

variables.name: HOST_PORT
variables.label: Web UI Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for the Plex web interface

variables.name: MEDIA_TV
variables.label: TV Shows Path
variables.description: Host path to your TV shows library

variables.name: MEDIA_MOVIES
variables.label: Movies Path
variables.description: Host path to your movies library

variables.name: MEDIA_MUSIC
variables.label: Music Path
variables.description: Host path to your music library

variables.name: PLEX_VERSION
variables.label: Update Channel
variables.description: docker = stable, latest = Plex Pass beta, public = latest public release
